summary: Tested Referral System (نظام الإحالات). Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: Fixed critical import error in ReferralsPage.js and verified both ReferralsPage and Settings page referral banner are working correctly.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: CRITICAL: Wrong import path '../contexts/AuthContext' instead of '../context/AuthContext' (plural vs singular)

seed_data_creation: Existing referral code used: RDTZFFCE (for user 0933333333)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Referral system fully tested. APIs: GET /api/referrals/my-code (gets code + stats), POST /api/referrals/validate-code (validates code), POST /api/referrals/apply (applies code to new user), GET /api/referrals/my-referrals (list of referred users), GET /api/referrals/admin/stats (admin only), GET/PUT /api/referrals/admin/settings (admin only). Frontend: ReferralsPage at /referrals shows code, stats, share button, how it works. SettingsPage has referral banner that links to /referrals. Note: Login button requires Enter key press rather than click.

get_my_referral_code_api.details: Returns referral code, share link, stats (total_referrals, successful_referrals, total_earnings), and rewards info

validate_referral_code_api.details: Validates code (case insensitive), returns valid status, referrer name, and discount amount. Returns 404 for invalid codes, 400 for empty

apply_referral_code_api.details: Validates new customer only, prevents own code usage, creates referral record and coupon for referee

admin_referral_stats_api.details: Returns total codes, referrals count, completed/pending, conversion rate, total rewards, top referrers. Admin only (403 for non-admin)

admin_referral_settings_api.details: Get/update referrer_reward (10000), referee_discount (20%), min_order_for_reward (30000), is_active. Admin only for PUT

referrals_page_ui.details: Shows referral code (RDTZFFCE), 10,000 SYP reward, share button, 'How it works' section (3 steps), stats (invites/successful/earnings)

settings_referral_banner.details: Purple gradient banner with Gift icon, 'ادعُ أصدقاءك واربح!' title, '10,000 ل.س' reward. Clicking navigates to /referrals
